prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年河北工业大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约63366名、42751名、77422名、47164名、44745名。近三年位次波动较大，2023年出现异常后移（77422名），2024年迅速回升至47164名，2025年进一步前移至44745名，呈明显回暖趋势。2025年44745名为近三年最佳位次，成为本次预测的基准；该校在山东省综合类招生计划持续扩增：2021年57人→2022年67人→2023年67人→2024年73人→2025年86人→2026年91人。2026年较2025年扩招5人（增幅约5.8%），连续第5年扩招，扩招趋势明确，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 河北工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第107名，近年排名稳定在100–110名区间，属于中等偏上水平211院校。学校主体位于天津市，是河北省唯一一所211高校，在京津冀地区具有较高认可度；该校在2021–2026年声誉评价文件中未出现明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音学校热度总排名第93位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量处于中等水平，未出现高热关注或负面炒作，报考心理预期平稳。该校传统优势领域为电气工程、机械工程、材料科学与工程、化学工程与技术等工科方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信（高热推荐，76.86）、计算机类（推荐，67.8）、能源动力（推荐，66.43）等工科热门专业与该校优势方向高度匹配，相关专业报考热度持续升温，对整体录取位次有上推作用。山东省2026年高考报名总人数约72万人，较2025年68.1万人增加约3.9万人（增幅约5.7%），竞争进一步加剧。；河北工业大学位于天津市，虽为河北省属但地处直辖市，对山东考生具有较强跨省吸引力。2026年在山东招生计划91人，占该校全国招生比例约3–4%，属于中等偏大生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次44745名、2026年扩招5.8%（缓解竞争）、山东省考生增加5.7%（加剧竞争）、工科热门专业热度持续升温（推高位次）等多重因素，扩招与考生增幅基本对冲，但专业热度和考生基数增加的综合效应略强于扩招效应，预计2026年录取位次较2025年小幅后移。预测最低录取位次约46336名，区间45836–46836名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约46336名，区间45836–46836名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档专业为主力选择，一档专业作为冲刺（需位次明显优于区间下限），三档专业作为稳妥保底。电气类、 自动化、电子类等工科热门专业竞争激烈，建议位次在45000名以内重点冲刺；数学、统计、大数据等新兴交叉学科性价比较高；土木、化工、外语等传统或劝退方向可作为保底 选项。芬兰校区合作专业虽专业热度高但学费较高，需结合家庭经济条件综合考量。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Hebei University of Technology in Shandong Province's comprehensive category were approximately 63,366, 42,751, 77,422, 47,164, and 44,745 respectively. Rankings fluctuated significantly in the past three years, with an abnormal drop in 2023 (77,422), a rapid recovery to 47,164 in 2024, and further advancement to 44,745 in 2025, showing a clear warming trend. The 2025 ranking of 44,745 is the best in the past three years and serves as the baseline for this prediction. The university's enrollment plan in Shandong's comprehensive category has been continuously expanding: 57 in 2021 → 67 in 2022 → 67 in 2023 → 73 in 2024 → 86 in 2025 → 91 in 2026. In 2026, there will be an additional 5 students compared to 2025 (an increase of about 5.8%), marking the fifth consecutive year of expansion, with a clear trend that alleviates competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hebei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 107th, with a stable ranking in the 100–110 range in recent years, placing it at an upper-middle level among 211 institutions. The university's main campus is located in Tianjin, making it the only 211 university in Hebei Province, with high recognition in the Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei region. From 2021 to 2026, there have been no significant negative public opinions or record of admission gaps in the university's reputation evaluation documents. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 93rd, rated as "average," with moderate short video exposure, no high-profile attention or negative hype, and stable psychological expectations for applicants. The university's traditional strengths lie in engineering fields such as electrical engineering, mechanical engineering, materials science and engineering, and chemical engineering and technology.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended, 76.86), Computer Science (recommended, 67.8), and Energy and Power (recommended, 66.43) align well with the university's strengths, and the popularity of these majors continues to rise, pushing up overall admission rankings. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Shandong Province is about 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (about 5.7%) from 681,000 in 2025, further intensifying competition. Hebei University of Technology is located in Tianjin, and although it is under Hebei Province, its location in a municipality directly under the central government makes it highly attractive to Shandong candidates. In 2026, the enrollment plan in Shandong is 91 students, accounting for about 3–4% of the university's national enrollment, making Shandong a moderately large source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 44,745, the 5.8% enrollment expansion in 2026 (alleviating competition), the 5.7% increase in Shandong candidates (intensifying competition), and the continued rise in popularity of engineering majors (pushing up rankings), the expansion and candidate increase roughly offset each other. However, the combined effect of major popularity and increased candidate base is slightly stronger than the expansion effect, so the 2026 admission ranking is expected to shift slightly backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 46,336, with a range of 45,836–46,836.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 46,336, with a range of 45,836–46,836. Candidates within the predicted range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as primary choices, Tier 1 majors as reach options (requiring a ranking significantly better than the lower bound of the range), and Tier 3 majors as safe backups. Popular engineering majors such as Electrical, Automation, and Electronics are highly competitive; candidates with rankings within 45,000 are advised to aim for these. Emerging interdisciplinary majors like Mathematics, Statistics, and Big Data offer good value. Traditional or less popular fields such as Civil Engineering, Chemical Engineering, and Foreign Languages can serve as backup options. Although the Finland Campus cooperative programs are popular, they have higher tuition fees, so family financial conditions should be considered comprehensively.
